creator: nxjoseph@protonmail.com
text:
(In reply to Li-Wen Hsu from comment #12)
> Thanks for updating the patches
You are welcome.

> It seems in a much better shape now.
Thanks.

> Since this port has not been added, can you provide a single, squeezed patch for us to apply?
Ok, I will.

> Also, it's no need to attach the poudriere or portlint logs, just letting us know it has passing those tests should be sufficient.
Okay, thanks.
